line_items.description: Manufacture the set up of drainage field test
Mobilise full set of drainage field test set up on land
Set up at each test location and carry out drainage field test
Purchase and supply water for drainage field test
Extra over G14 for distance/elevation
Provide and remove freeboard
Drainage modification — demolish artificial hard material
Drainage modification — construct U-channel

exclusions: Water supply (G14) assumed provided free of charge by the main contractor; not priced.
